title: Evangelion 30 Q Preview
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion 3.0/Q Preview (Spoilers) Post by CtHuLhU » Thu Jul 02, 2009 7:33 am Preview of Next Movie: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=O_4rd7ehsVc&fmt=18

[]: Post by LiLi » Thu Jul 02, 2009 7:43 am CtHuLhU wrote: Preview of Next Movie: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=O_4rd7ehsVc&fmt=18

[]: Post by BattleMonkey » Thu Jul 02, 2009 7:49 am KEEP OUT!

[]: Post by schismatics » Thu Jul 02, 2009 7:58 am Preview makes mah pants happy!!!!!!!!!! Also at the Mari video. Shinji's scream after gay chicken with Kaji was HILARIOUS.

[]: Post by JimmyWolk » Thu Jul 02, 2009 7:59 am LiLi wrote: ::EDIT:: DO I SPOT RIAO AND HER TWINS RIGHT THERE?!?!

[]: Post by LiLi » Thu Jul 02, 2009 8:01 am JimmyWolk wrote: Don't see RIAO, but there's definitly some more Reis at once (first thought she was carrying someone there 8) )

[]: Post by Ramiel² » Thu Jul 02, 2009 8:02 am 1. Keep out : Eva-01 Restricted Area No Entry beyond this point 2. Keep out : Tokyo-III Near Third impact Ground zero 3. Keep out : Near Third impact Eyewitness Debriefing in Progress No Entry without Authority 4. Keep out : Lilith Preservation Site Acces strictly restricted 5.Keep out : Eva-08 Construction Area No unauthorized Entry allowed 6. Keep out : SEELE`s Childrens assembly in Session Do not enter 7. Keep out : Private Conference between Mari Makinami Illustrious & <Censored> Do not Enter Furthermore we see Rei clones ,and something like i think an investigation of fuyutsuki and gendo in young years? Kaji holding a gun at someone.. Very promising

[]: Post by JimmyWolk » Thu Jul 02, 2009 8:07 am LiLi wrote: JimmyWolk wrote: Don't see RIAO, but there's definitly some more Reis at once (first thought she was carrying someone there 8) )

[]: Post by UrsusArctos » Thu Jul 02, 2009 8:11 am Asuka really does look like a Pirate. Slightly modified plugsuit- notice the blue around her neck? Ornette's right, the preview doesn't give the least suggestion as to what happens in 3.0. "Lilith Preservation Site". Preservation? 08 looks like it's got three eyes. What the hell?

[]: Post by ItsThatGuy » Thu Jul 02, 2009 8:17 am It's interesting that they'd put a halo around Eva 01, especially considering that they put it on the Angels. And how can you tell anything about what Eva 08 looks like? I could barely see anything. But at least this cam rip shows the whole screen, unlike the other rip. EDIT: That's not Unit 01! Oops, my bad. Is it Unit 08?

[]: Post by UrsusArctos » Thu Jul 02, 2009 8:31 am That's Kaworu's Eva-06, which looks a lot like Eva-01.

[]: Post by master_lloyd » Thu Jul 02, 2009 8:42 am It's Yami Yui.

[]: Post by STELLALUNA » Thu Jul 02, 2009 8:57 am LiLi wrote: DO I SPOT RIAO AND HER TWINS RIGHT THERE?!?!

[]: Post by Oedipusfoot » Thu Jul 02, 2009 9:00 am Images for Further Study http://i543.photobucket.com/albums/gg457/oedipusfoot/30preview.jpg

[]: Post by Agentomega » Thu Jul 02, 2009 9:24 am Is it a bad thing to want to watch the preview for the next movie before I've seen this one? (Then again, I did it with 1.0, so I suppose the answer is "no") I'mma watch this when I get home 'cuz stupid work has stupid restrictions on stupid youtube. stupid.

[]: Post by BattleMonkey » Thu Jul 02, 2009 9:32 am UrsusArctos wrote: Asuka really does look like a Pirate. Slightly modified plugsuit- notice the blue around her neck?

[]: Post by Ingraman » Thu Jul 02, 2009 9:41 am First pic of Eva-06 in the actual colors, interesting. Thank you guys!

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jul 02, 2009 9:42 am What. the. hell. Also: I think the Reis we see are 1, 2 & 3. Maybe?

[]: Post by JimmyWolk » Thu Jul 02, 2009 9:52 am BattleMonkey wrote: UrsusArctos wrote: Asuka really does look like a Pirate. Slightly modified plugsuit- notice the blue around her neck?

[]: Post by Alfa&Omega » Thu Jul 02, 2009 9:58 am Plz some one upload it before youtube delete the video
